name: constitution-drift-detector
description: Flags when files that affect the constitution have changed

action.message:
⚠️ Constitution drift detected: `{changed_file}` has changed. This file affects the {inferred_section} section of docs/ai/constitution.md. Consider re-running the relevant analyst:
- Schema change → re-run data-model-analyst
- Route/controller change → re-run api-contract-analyst + runtime-flow-analyst
- package.json change → re-run dependency-analyst
- Middleware change → re-run runtime-flow-analyst
